name: AWS EC2 IAM Instance Profile Disassociation Attempt
description: Detects actions that remove an IAM instance profile from an EC2 instance, potentially disrupting security controls and access management. This could indicate an attempt to evade monitoring, modify instance permissions, or escalate privileges.

rules.name: AWS EC2 IAM Instance Profile Disassociation Attempt

author: Christopher Ordonez & Sunil Bharti
